_meta.purpose: Leukaemia / blast morphology -> leukaemia type. Keys are YOLO class names from the leukemia detector. The vision service resolves each detected blast to its leukaemia type + significance and flags criticals. Decision support only; a haematologist + flow cytometry/cytogenetics confirm the diagnosis.
_meta.source: C-NMC 2019 / ALL-IDB classes + standard blast morphology (WHO). Curated for JORINOVA NEXUS.

blast.name: Blast cell
blast.note: Critical: urgent haematology review. Confirm lineage with flow cytometry.

lymphoblast.name: Lymphoblast
lymphoblast.note: Critical: commonest childhood leukaemia. Urgent referral.

myeloblast.name: Myeloblast
myeloblast.note: Critical: look for Auer rods. Urgent referral.

abnormal_promyelocyte.name: Abnormal promyelocyte
abnormal_promyelocyte.note: MEDICAL EMERGENCY: DIC risk. Start ATRA on suspicion; confirm PML-RARA.
